zh.lifeSummary: 當Margretha Helena Widman於1633年11月9日出生在德國巴登可萊斯 卡爾茲盧時，她的父親Andreas Widman29歲，母親Catarina Bellinger1歲。她於大約1653年與Hanss Georg Kieffer在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1709年11月12日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margretha Helena Widman于1633年11月9日出生在德国巴登可萊斯 卡爾茲盧时，她的父亲Andreas Widman29岁，母亲Catarina Bellinger1岁。她于大约1653年与Hanss Georg Kieffer在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1709年11月12日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Widman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element wid- (possibly from Old Swedish vithr ‘wood, forest’, or from a placename formed with Old Swedish vīd ‘wide’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element wid-.
Americanized form of South German   Widmann  .

variants.name: Widen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Gunnel, Iver, Lennart, Sven.
Swedish (Widén): ornamental or habitational name composed of the element Wid- (see Widman ) + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Widmark
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements Wid- (see Widman ) + mark ‘land’.

variants.name: Widmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Reinhard, Armin, Christoph, Gerhard, Klaus.
South German: status name from Middle High German widem(e) ‘prebend’ (church-owned property in the form of land, a farm, etc. for agricultural use, mostly to support the village priest) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Widing
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name composed of the element wid- (see Widman ) + the suffix -ing ‘belonging to’.

variants.name: Widell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element Wid- (see Widman ) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margretha Helena Widman was born on 9 November 1633, in Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany, her father, Andreas Widman, was 29 and her mother, Catarina Bellinger, was 1. She married Hanss Georg Kieffer about 1653, in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 November 1709, in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margretha Helena Widman est née le 9 novembre 1633, à Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Allemagne, son père, Andreas Widman, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Catarina Bellinger, avait 1 ans. Elle a épousé Hanss Georg Kieffer environ 1653, à Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 novembre 1709, à Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margretha Helena Widman am 9. November 1633 in Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andreas Widman 29 und ihre Mutter Catarina Bellinger 1. Sie hat um 1653 in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Hanss Georg Kieffer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. November 1709 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margretha Helena Widman è nata il il 9 novembre 1633 nel Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Germania, sua padre, Andreas Widman, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Catarina Bellinger, aveva 1 anni. Lei sposato Hanss Georg Kieffer circa 1653, nel Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1709, nel Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margretha Helena Widmanが1633年11月9日にドイツバデンクレイス カルルスルヘで生まれた時，父Andreas Widmanは29歳，母Catarina Bellingerは1歳であった。約1653年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘブランケンロチでHanss Georg Kiefferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1709年11月12日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘブランケンロチで76歳で死去した。

ko.Blankenlöch, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württember: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 칼스루헤 스투텐시 블랭켄럭
ko.lifeSummary: Margretha Helena Widman(이)가 1633년 11월 9일 독일 바든 크레이스 칼스루헤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andreas Widman(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catarina Bellinger(은)는 1세였다. 그녀는 대략 1653년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 블랭켄럭에서 Hanss Georg Kieffer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1709년 11월 12일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 블랭켄럭에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 November 1633–12 November 1709: 9 de novembro de 1633–12 de novembro de 1709
pt.Blankenlöch, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württember: Blankenloch, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margretha Helena Widman nasceu em 9 de novembro de 1633, em Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemanha, seu pai, Andreas Widman, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Catarina Bellinger, tinha 1 anos. Ela casou-se com Hanss Georg Kieffer aproximadamente 1653, em Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1709, em Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margretha Helena Widman родилась 9 ноября 1633 г. в местности крис карлсрух, баден, Германия, её отцу по имени Andreas Widman было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Catarina Bellinger, 1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hanss Georg Kieffer около 1653 г. в местности бланкенлоч, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 ноября 1709 г. в местности бланкенлоч, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margretha Helena Widman nació el 9 de noviembre de 1633, en Kreis Karlsruhe, Baden, Alemania, su papá, Andreas Widman, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Catarina Bellinger, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Hanss Georg Kieffer aproximadamente 1653, en Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1709, en Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, a la edad de 76 años.
